description: Lenovo Zero-Floor typography overlay: weight and role rules only. Font families are NOT defined here — always use typography.json (Rookery sans, Martian Mono). Use with [data-theme="lenovo"] for color theme; do not replace typography.json globally.

allowed.description: Permitted weights only. Do not use 600 (font-semibold) on Lenovo surfaces — use medium (500) or bold (700).

display.description: Align with typography.fontSize scale: use 6xl-equivalent + fontWeight.bold + lineHeight.tight + tighter tracking from policies/typography.md where applicable.

body.description: base/sm/lg sizes: weight 400, lineHeight.normal — use typography.json fontSize.body*, bodyL, etc.

label.description: sm/xs with weight 500, tracking from voice-and-tone — never weight 600.
